# kaleido_platform_connector_standard_stream (Resource)

Deploys a standard stream from a connector service's embedded definitions, optionally binding it to a config profile.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) Environment ID
- `name` (String) Standard stream template name (e.g. newBlocks)
- `service` (String) Connector service ID

### Optional

- `config_profile_name_or_id` (String) Name or ID of the config profile to bind to the stream (must be of the config type expected by the stream's factory).
- `description` (String) Optional description override.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
